messages.content:
Hey there, just thought I'd reach out and see if you have evening shifts, I've been working as barista since 2008 and have just gotten my RSA currently working in cafe doing the occasional cocktail but hoping to develop more skills and just seeing if there's any shifts available looking for about 1-2 shifts mon - sat. Also local only live around the corner from you guys in Mayfield. Happy to pass on resume etc
Thanks in advance
Nicole Fisher
